msk.cluster.clientauthentication.Sasl.Description: Details for client authentication using SASL. To turn on SASL, you must also turn on `EncryptionInTransit` by setting `inCluster` to true. You must set `clientBroker` to either `TLS` or `TLS_PLAINTEXT`. If you choose `TLS_PLAINTEXT`, then you must also set `unauthenticated` to true.

msk.cluster.clientauthentication.Tls.Description: Details for ClientAuthentication using TLS. To turn on TLS access control, you must also turn on `EncryptionInTransit` by setting `inCluster` to true and `clientBroker` to `TLS`.

msk.cluster.clientauthentication.Unauthe.Description: Details for ClientAuthentication using no authentication.
